test.name: Execute Process

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.
kw.msg: Cannot capture screenshot because no browser is open.

SessionNotCreatedException: Message: session not created: This version of ChromeDriver only supports Chrome version 146 Current browser version is 127.0.6533.99 with binary path C:\Program Files\Autosphere\Browser\chrome-win64\chrome.exe Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7e11a29c5+2ed785] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7e0eca0d0+14e90] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7e0c2db2d] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7e0c75c3d] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7e0c74995] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7e0c6eea7] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7e0c697a1] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7e0cbdc51] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7e0cbd4b6] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7e0c79298] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7e0c7a183] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7e11cde0d+318bcd] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7e11c8588+313348] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7e11e9d7a+334b3a] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7e0ee6785+31545] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7e0eefacc+3a88c] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7e0ed3634+1e3f4] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7e0ed37e6+1e5a6] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7e0eb7e37+2bf7] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7ffed015e8d7+17] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7ffed10ec40c+2c]

kw.doc: Click the element identified by ``locator``.

test.status: SessionNotCreatedException: Message: session not created: This version of ChromeDriver only supports Chrome version 146 Current browser version is 127.0.6533.99 with binary path C:\Program Files\Autosphere\Browser\chrome-win64\chrome.exe Stacktrace: chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7e11a29c5+2ed785] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7e0eca0d0+14e90] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7e0c2db2d] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7e0c75c3d] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7e0c74995] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7e0c6eea7] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7e0c697a1] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7e0cbdc51] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7e0cbd4b6] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7e0c79298] chromedriver!(No symbol) [0x7ff7e0c7a183] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7e11cde0d+318bcd] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7e11c8588+313348] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7e11e9d7a+334b3a] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7e0ee6785+31545] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7e0eefacc+3a88c] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7e0ed3634+1e3f4] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7e0ed37e6+1e5a6] chromedriver!GetHandleVerifier [0x7ff7e0eb7e37+2bf7] KERNEL32!BaseThreadInitThunk [0x7ffed015e8d7+17] ntdll!RtlUserThreadStart [0x7ffed10ec40c+2c]

errors.msg: This is a deprecated import that will be removed in favor of Autosphere.Browser.Selenium
